Cell Phone Data Breach Settlement: Up to $100 Without Proof

Cellular customers between 2018 and 2022 may be eligible to receive up to $100 from a class action settlement resolving claims that the company exposed user data through an unsecured backup. The settlement provides cash payments to all class members who file a valid claim form.

  • Deadline: March 14, 2027
  • Estimated Award: $100
  • Proof of Purchase: No proof of purchase required
  • Settlement Administrator: Acme Settlement Services
  • Case Number: 22-cv-04421
  • Class Members: anyone who held an account between 2018-2022

To file a claim, submit the online form before the deadline. No documentation required — claim form only.
